title: stellularia media var. aquatica
intro: Stellularia media var. aquatica, commonly known as Blue Mountain tea, is a variety of the Stellularia media plant, which is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Stellularia media var. aquatica include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional medicine to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
